🔐 Identity & SSO

Single sign-on, OAuth and identity providers you can self-host — open source alternatives to Okta, Auth0 and Azure AD.

Popular SaaS in this category

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Alternatives to Okta

Enterprise identity, SSO and MFA cloud.

4 alternatives
Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Keycloak

Enterprise-grade identity and access management from Red Hat.

License: Apache-2.0 Self-host: ★★★★☆

Authentik

Modern identity provider with a polished admin UI.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Authelia

Single sign-on portal designed for reverse proxies.

License: Apache-2.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Zitadel

Cloud-native identity platform built in Go with event sourcing.

License: Apache-2.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆
OpenInstead — open source alternatives to the SaaS you already use. Updated April 2026.
Disclaimer: licensing, features and pricing change. Verify each tool's current status on its official site before committing.
